title: Decorators, Cross-Cutting Behavior, and Transparent Wrappers · Pipeline Retrieval
summary: Add retries, timing, authorization checks, and telemetry without changing business function contracts. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a transparent decorator stack with order tests after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Translate decorator syntax into explicit rebinding and predict application order.
Separate decorator configuration, function wrapping, and call execution across closure layers.
Preserve signatures, metadata, return values, exceptions, and async behavior through wrappers.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
